description: Adele's 'Skyfall' is the retained foundation (full mix, own vocal load-bearing). Linkin Park's 'In the End' enters selectively as an added vocal layer during a Skyfall chorus. Intended convergence: the stressed 'hard' in 'I tried so hard' lands on (or within about one beat of) the sung 'fall' in 'Skyfall'. Artistic viability is treated as known ground truth; the exact alignment parameters are the empirical unknowns recorded below.

host.title: Skyfall
host.version_note: Studio single version assumed; a different edit shifts every time value. Pin the exact local file (duration + content hash) in the local annotation file before annotating.

duration_sec.note: measure from the pinned local file

guest.title: In the End
guest.version_note: Studio album version assumed; pin the exact local file before annotating.

duration_sec.note: measure from the pinned local file

host_anchor_section_occurrence.note: which Skyfall chorus hosts the entry is not yet established; any of them is plausible, the final chorus most dramatic

guest_entry_offset_beats.note: where the guest phrase starts relative to the host chorus start; derived once the convergence offset and phrase length are annotated

host_bpm.note: unverified prior; measure locally via scripts/eval_tempo.py --backend librosa. Never copy into a MEASURED TrackAnalysis by hand.

guest_bpm.note: unverified prior; measure locally. The host/guest ratio is far from 1:1 and not obviously 2:1 — the tempo treatment is a real open question, not a formality.

tempo_ratio.note: guest stretch factor onto the host grid. Candidate treatments: large single stretch, half/double reading, or rhythmic re-phrasing of the guest vocal; which one the construction intends is unresolved.

guest_key.note: unverified prior (often cited as D#/Eb minor)

pitch_shift_semitones.note: applied to the guest vocal if keys are conformed; whether the construction conforms key at all (vs. leaning on the rap delivery being pitch-flexible) is unresolved

events.lyric_context: 'Let the sky fall' / the sung 'fall' of 'Skyfall'
events.occurrence: each occurrence within the anchor chorus; the intended one is unresolved

time_sec.note: annotate every candidate 'fall' onset in the anchor chorus

events.lyric_context: 'I tried so hard and got so far'
events.occurrence: hook/chorus statement; which repetition is unresolved

offset_beats.note: 'hard' lands on 'fall', or within about one host beat of it; the true offset and its sign are the central empirical anchor

tolerance_beats.note: how far the landing can drift before the effect degrades — to be resolved by the listening pass over the offset grid, not assumed

convergences.note: Compound convergence: a stressed-syllable rhythmic landing, a semantic collision (striving vs. falling), plausibly reinforced by the chorus arrival. Which components are load-bearing is itself an experimental question — see the design memo.

taxonomy_gap_notes: No single MashupMoveType captures this: it is overlay-shaped at macro scale, hook_collision-shaped at the anchor (both vocals audible and load-bearing), genre_contrast in aesthetic, and lyrical_juxtaposition in mechanism (currently out of scope). The host role 'full_mix with load-bearing own vocal' does not exist in TrackRole, and nothing in the production data model encodes entry point, section anchoring, or event-level convergence. Recorded here as data; see docs/design-memo-skyfall-construction-case.md before proposing any taxonomy change.
